_comment: Box-select three regiments of different size (Spearmen spawn TIGHT, Infantry NORMAL, Archers LOOSE by default) and drag a flank line to split them under the new default mode -- equal depth, space basis: every regiment forms up to the same PHYSICAL depth. Tight and Normal share the same spacing_scale (1.0), so their split still tracks the space/count distinction; the loosely-spread Archers (spacing_scale 2.0) end up with a visibly different file count for a genuinely density-driven reason. A custom no-enemy scenario isolates the split mechanic from any combat.
